popularStory.headline: John of Gaunt, 1st Duke of Lancaster, KG, (6 March 1340-3 February 1399)
popularStory.description: John of Gaunt, 1st Duke of Lancaster, KG, (6 March 1340-3 February 1399), was an English prince, military leader, and statesman. He was the third of five surviving sons of King Edward III of England. …

zh.lifeSummary: 當John of Gaunt於1340年3月6日出生在比利時奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特時，他的父親Edward III King of England27歲，母親Philippa de Hainault Queen of England26歲。他於1359年5月19日與Blanche of Lancaster在英國英格蘭波克夏雷亞丁結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1399年2月3日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特享年58歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John of Gaunt于1340年3月6日出生在比利时奧斯吉福拉安德倫根特时，他的父亲Edward III King of England27岁，母亲Philippa de Hainault Queen of England26岁。他于1359年5月19日与Blanche of Lancaster在英国英格兰波克夏雷亞丁结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1399年2月3日在英国英格兰萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特享年58岁，埋葬在英国英格兰倫敦聖 包利斯 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: of
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Sung, Jung, Yong, Chang, Kwang, Sang, Dong, Hyun, Jae, Jin, Kyung, Jong, Chong, Chung, Byung, Jeong, Pyong, Myong, Hak, Jin Hwan, Sook, Yeong, Choon.

variants.name: O
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Bo Young, Chae, Chong Hwan, Dong Kun, Ho, Hwan, Hyun, Jong, Jung, Ki Soon, Kwang.  Korean Min, Chong, Chol, Jung Ho, Myong, Sa, Sung Kyun.

Korean (오; Chinese character: 吳): historically, there were two Chinese characters for the O surname, but by the late Koryŏ period (14th century AD ), one of them had disappeared. Some records indicate that there are as many as 210 different clans for the remaining character, but only sixteen can be positively documented. All sixteen of these clans originate from the same ancestor, O Ch’ŏm (吳 瞻), who migrated to Korea from China during the reign of Shilla's King Chijŭng (500–514 AD ). O is a common surname throughout Korea. Compare Oh .

nameMeanings.name: Gaunt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Gant
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Ghent in Flanders, Belgium.
English: from Middle English gaunt, gant ‘slim, slender; drawn, thin and angular’.
North German: probably a variant of   Gans   ‘goose’.

variants.name: Gauntt
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Gaunt  .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John of Gaunt was born on 6 March 1340, in Gent, East Flanders, Belgium, his father, Edward III King of England, was 27 and his mother, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, was 26. He married Blanche of Lancaster on 19 May 1359, in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 3 February 1399, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 58, and was buried in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John of Gaunt est né le 6 mars 1340, à Gent, Flandre-Orientale, Belgique, son père, Edward III King of England, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, avait 26 ans. Il a épousé Blanche of Lancaster le 19 mai 1359, à Reading, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 3 février 1399, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 58 ans, et a été enterré à St Paul's Cathedral, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John of Gaunt am 6. März 1340 in Gent, Ostflandern, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Edward III King of England 27 und seine Mutter Philippa de Hainault Queen of England 26. Er hat am 19. Mai 1359 in Reading, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Blanche of Lancaster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 3. Februar 1399 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Paul's Cathedral, London, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando John of Gaunt è nato il il 6 marzo 1340 nel Gent, Fiandra Orientale, Belgio, il suo padre, Edward III King of England, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, aveva 26 anni. Lui sposato Blanche of Lancaster il 19 maggio 1359, nel Reading, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 3 febbraio 1399, nel Leicester, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 58 anni, e fu sepolto a St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Queens Chapel, Reading Abbey, Reading, B: イギリスイギリスバークシュアイアレアディング
ja.lifeSummary: John of Gauntが1340年3月6日にベルギーオオスト-vラアンデレンジェントで生まれた時，父Edward III King of Englandは27歳，母Philippa de Hainault Queen of Englandは26歳であった。1359年5月19日にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアレアディングでBlanche of Lancasterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1399年2月3日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターで58歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスロンドンスト プアウル'ス カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.Leicester the Castle View, Leicestershir: 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터 테 카스틀 비w
ko.York Minster, Yorkshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 요르크 요르크 민스터
ko.St Paul's Cathedral, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 폴'스 캐테드럴
ko.lifeSummary: John of Gaunt(이)가 1340년 3월 6일 벨기에 스트-블라아더 젠트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Edward III King of England(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa de Hainault Queen of England(은)는 26세였다. 그는 1359년 5월 19일 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 리딩에서 Blanche of Lancaster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1399년 2월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 58세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 런던 스트 폴'스 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando John of Gaunt nasceu em 6 de março de 1340, em Gent, Flandres Oriental, Bélgica, seu pai, Edward III King of England, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tinha 26 anos. Ele casou-se com Blanche of Lancaster em 19 de maio de 1359, em Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 3 de fevereiro de 1399, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 58 anos, e foi sepultado em St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.St Paul's Cathedral, London, England: ст поул'с кэтедраль, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда John of Gaunt родился 6 марта 1340 г. в местности джент, уст-влаандирен, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Edward III King of England было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, 26. Он женился на женщине по имени Blanche of Lancaster 19 мая 1359 г. в местности ридинг, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер 3 февраля 1399 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 58 лет и был похоронен в местности ст поул'с кэтедраль, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando John of Gaunt nació el 6 de marzo de 1340, en Gent, Flandes Oriental, Bélgica, su papá, Edward III King of England, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Philippa de Hainault Queen of England, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Blanche of Lancaster el 19 de mayo de 1359, en Reading, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 3 de febrero de 1399, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 58 años, y fue sepultado en St Paul's Cathedral, London, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
